title: I keep what comes to me
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for building the belief that money can land and stay.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 19 of the MONEY program. Use when money has arrived and the response is anxiety rather than ease, or when you find yourself spending quickly to avoid holding a large balance.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 19 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when money has come in and the relief is immediately undercut by "how long before it's gone?"

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 19 of the MONEY program. The statement works on the fear of impermanence around money: the conviction that what comes in will leave, that holding a full account is naive, that good fortune is borrowed rather than earned.
I am ready to release all fear that money will leave as soon as it arrives. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow money that stays, that grows, that I keep. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 19 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
